description_long: This object is a rectangular, vertically-oriented electric water heater with a smooth, white exterior casing. The front face features a control panel at the bottom, which includes two rotary dials and indicator lights, as well as a visible Electrolux logo. The sides are plain, but the rear view reveals two robust wall-mounting brackets, indicating it is designed to be securely attached to a vertical surface. The top and sides are gently rounded, giving the unit a modern, unobtrusive appearance. The materials appear to be primarily metal and plastic, with internal components likely including heating elements and insulation. The overall design is functional and streamlined, suitable for installation in urban residential or commercial environments.
description: A modern, wall-mounted electric water heater with a white, rectangular body, front control panel, and rear mounting brackets.
description_view_0: Front view showing the control panel with two rotary dials, indicator lights, and the Electrolux logo.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain, smooth surface and a glimpse of the mounting brackets extending from the back.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting two large, integrated wall-mounting brackets for secure attachment.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with mounting brackets visible and a plain surface.
